feed.title: bbcnews TikTok
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from bbcnews

entry.title: "I wouldn't worry, we're not in the same class" x #TombRaider #LaraCroft #TombRaiderRemastered #BaftaGames #BaftaGamesAwards #Bafta #Zelda #Pokemon #Pikachu #Mario #SuperMario #Agent47 #PacMan #GamingTok #GameTok #VideoGame #VideoGames #GamesAwards #Gamin

entry.title: Two people were left injured after a Lamborghini and Corvette caused "a chain reaction collision" in Dallas, Texas. #HitandRun #NFL #RasheeRice #Texas #KansasCityChiefs #Lamborghini #Corvette #AmericanFootball #BBCNews
entry.content: Two people were left injured after a Lamborghini and Corvette caused "a chain reaction collision" in Dallas, Texas. #HitandRun #NFL #RasheeRice #Texas #KansasCityChiefs #Lamborghini #Corvette #AmericanFootball #BBCNews

entry.title: The pig kidney was modified to remove harmful pig genes and add certain human genes to improve its compatibility with humans. #PigKidney #Pig #Transplant #OrganTransplant #HumanTransplant #PigTransplant #Hospital #Kidney #KidneyDisease #Dialysis
entry.content: The pig kidney was modified to remove harmful pig genes and add certain human genes to improve its compatibility with humans. #PigKidney #Pig #Transplant #OrganTransplant #HumanTransplant #PigTransplant #Hospital #Kidney #KidneyDisease #Dialysis

entry.title: “For your information, my back is fine, but my ego...”, French diver Alexis Jandard said. #Olympics #Olympics2024 #Paris2024 #Diving #Swimming #ParisOlympics #AlexJandard #BBCNews
entry.content: “For your information, my back is fine, but my ego...”, French diver Alexis Jandard said. #Olympics #Olympics2024 #Paris2024 #Diving #Swimming #ParisOlympics #AlexJandard #BBCNews

entry.title: Twenty-eight countries voted in favour, six against, and 13 abstained from the resolution calling for a weapons ban on Israel. #UN #HumanRights #UNHRC #HumanRightsCouncil #Israel #Gaza #BreakingNews #BBCNews
entry.content: Twenty-eight countries voted in favour, six against, and 13 abstained from the resolution calling for a weapons ban on Israel. #UN #HumanRights #UNHRC #HumanRightsCouncil #Israel #Gaza #BreakingNews #BBCNews

entry.title: The offer will mean some consultants will receive a pay increase of nearly 20%. #NHS #NHSPay #Strikes #Doctors #Health #BreakingNews #BBCNews
entry.content: The offer will mean some consultants will receive a pay increase of nearly 20%. #NHS #NHSPay #Strikes #Doctors #Health #BreakingNews #BBCNews

entry.title: The Israeli military has sacked two senior officers after seven World Central Kitchen aid workers were killed in a strike in Gaza on Monday. #WorldCentralKitchen #WCK #Israel #Gaza #BreakingNews #BBCNews
entry.content: The Israeli military has sacked two senior officers after seven World Central Kitchen aid workers were killed in a strike in Gaza on Monday. #WorldCentralKitchen #WCK #Israel #Gaza #BreakingNews #BBCNews

entry.title: Are you seeing a rise in sexism at your school? #School #Education #SocialMedia #InternetSafety #Classrooms #Classes #Learning #GCSEs #ALevels #BBCNews

entry.title: A magnitude 4.8 earthquake has been felt across New York and the surrounding areas. #NewYork #NewJersey #Earthquake #US #BBCNews
entry.content: A magnitude 4.8 earthquake has been felt across New York and the surrounding areas. #NewYork #NewJersey #Earthquake #US #BBCNews

entry.title: An Israeli military inquiry said that the unit involved believed the three WCK vehicles targeted with missiles had been taken over by Hamas gunmen. #WorldCentralKitchen #WCK #IDF #Israel #Gaza #BBCNews
entry.content: An Israeli military inquiry said that the unit involved believed the three WCK vehicles targeted with missiles had been taken over by Hamas gunmen. #WorldCentralKitchen #WCK #IDF #Israel #Gaza #BBCNews
